content.fullText:
1. A particle of the substance that is digested exactly matches the shape of the enzyme
  2. A reaction takes place in which the nutrient is split into two new particles (the digestion products).
  3. The new particles release from the enzyme. The enzyme can now react with the next particle of nutrient.
  4. The function of digestion is to convert nutrients that cannot be absorbed into the blood through the intestinal wall into digestive products that can be absorbed into the blood.
  5. Nutrients that are digested include: proteins, most carbohydrates and fats
  6. Substances that do not need to be digested are: glucose, minerals, vitamins and water
  7. Mechanical digestion is breaking food into small pieces by chewing
  8. Chemical digestion is the conversion of nutrients using digestive juices made by digestive glands.
  9. Enzymes work according to the key-lock principle.

Não há respostas certas ou erradas. As vantagens de participar deste estudo são que o agente conversacional pode auxiliar os usuários na comunicação e fornecer orientação, feedback e assistência, o que pode ajudá-los a melhorar suas interações sociais e habilidades de comunicação. Não há riscos previstos associados à participação neste estudo. Sua participação é totalmente voluntária e você pode interrompê-la a qualquer momento, sem sofrer quaisquer consequências, entrando em contato com o pesquisador. Sua participação neste estudo será mantida em sigilo e nenhuma informação pessoal será armazenada juntamente com os dados. Após a análise, os dados serão excluídos. Li e compreendi o material do estudo e desejo continuar.

content.help:
• Data format: Compact JSON is the smallest and the best suitable for automatic processing.
  • Data format: pretty JSON is the largest and relative easy to read by humans. It is still suitable for automatic processing.
  • Export way: standard is the proven export way, but it does not work for ILSses with a large amount of resources and/or log actions.
  • Export way: streaming (experimental) is a new export way, which does work for ILSses with a large amount of resources and/or log actions.
  • The Export location is decided by the browser, the data is handled in the same way and stored in the same location as web downloads.
  • ILS structure describes the phases and apps in the ILS.
  • Resources are the products that students have created. The resources are created by the apps in the ILS.
  • Log actions describes the actions of the students in the ILS and the apps. The log actions are only stored, if "Enable learning analytics" is enabled for the ILS in graasp.
  • Users contains the id, display name and user type of the users of the ILS. The user type can be graasp_student, graasp_editor or group.
